emails.subject: Financial Confirmations Issues
emails.body: All: I spoke with Kim this morning and although she is anxious to meet everyone, we decided that it would be more productive to try to schedule a luncheon meeting to discuss current issues related to the confirmation desk. I understand that Joe Hunter, Melissa Murphy and David Dupre will be providing Kim with a list of "issues" and we have been invited to add to that list. Please send me your list of any confirmation issues that you would like raised with Kim which I will cumulate and forward. You may ignore the message below. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 10/26/2000 10:17 AM Yolanda Ford 10/25/2000 05:01 PM

emails.subject: Financial Confirmations Issues
